name: Software Discovery and Enumeration
description: Detects enumeration of installed software for vulnerability identification
query:
// Detect installed software enumeration
// Trigger on wmic product list, dpkg, rpm, or registry queries
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(wmic\s+product|Get-WmiObject.*Win32_Product|reg.*query.*Uninstall|dpkg\s+-l|rpm\s+-qa|apt\s+list\s+--installed)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 120 seconds
